breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Dome Author Deploys AI Co-Defender — Our AI Watchers Are Watching His AI
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: The dome author has added a GitHub Actions workflow running Groq llama-3.3-70b-versatile daily at 05:15 UTC to auto-generate a review of his own site. This escalates the information environment: the dome now has machine-speed response capability for incoming critiques.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Represents a qualitative change in the dome's defensive posture — from passive to AI-assisted active defense. Also creates a potential prompt-injection vector if our pipeline reads their AI output uncritically.
